name: Cuttyhunk Paprika Scallops
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the seasoned bread crumbs, paprika, and flour in a mixing bowl.
2. Add the scallops to the mixture and toss thoroughly to coat evenly.
3. Melt 4 tablespoons of butter in a large frying pan over medium-high heat.
4. If your pan is not large enough to cook the scallops in one layer, prepare them in two batches.
5. Add the scallops to the pan and cook for about 5 minutes, stirring gently.
6. Allow the scallops to brown nicely before adding the chopped scallions and parsley.
7. Cook for an additional 3 minutes, then serve on hot plates garnished with lemon slices.
The nutty flavor of short grain brown rice pairs well with this scallop dish.
